title: Smoked Bass with Irish Salad
description: A keto-friendly dish featuring smoky bass and a refreshing irish salad.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and place the smoked bass fillets on it.
Season the bass with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake the bass in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
While the bass is baking, prepare the salad by combining the mixed greens, crunchy bacon, diced chives, cherry tomatoes, and red onion in a large bowl.
Once the bass is done, remove it from the oven and let it rest for a few minutes before flaking it into the salad.
Drizzle the keto ranch dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
Serve the smoked bass on top of the salad and enjoy!
